    def test_audio_block_resolve_audio_with_progress_callback():
        from llama_index.core.base.llms.types import AudioBlock
    
        # Define test audio: has padding to simulate trimming behavior
        padded_audio = b"\x00\x00\xde\xad\xbe\xef\x00"
        b64_audio = base64.b64encode(padded_audio)
        block = AudioBlock(audio=b64_audio)
    
        captured_size = None
